reviews.comment:
Los chicos que te cargan  combustible unos genios... ahora dependiendo quien esté en el kiosko no usen la nueva tarjeta de mercadobpago xq disque "no pueden confirmar si es tuya realmente" (no lleva nombre pero si un qr para ver los datos del titular x cuestiones de seguridad) tampoco aceptan trasferencias desde mercado pago disque porque "hay muchas estafas".... moraleja... en kiosko lleven plata xq es como en el año 1800 y mucha paciencia xq se demoran bastante en atender... por lo demas en los surtidores nos encontramos en el 2024 sin ningún tipo de complicación

(Translated by Google)
The guys who pump your gas are geniuses... now, depending on who's at the gas station, don't use the new Mercado Pago card because they say "they can't confirm if it's really yours" (it doesn't have a name on it, but it does have a QR code to see the cardholder's information for security reasons). They also don't accept transfers from Mercado Pago because they say "there are a lot of scams"... moral of the story... bring cash to the gas station because it's like the 1800s, and a lot of patience because they take a long time to serve you... otherwise, at the pumps, we're in 2024 without any problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxaGZMTV93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Son estafadores, tengan cuidado al cargar. Simulan cargar combustible y no lo hacen. Ya realizamos la denuncia pertinente. Controlen antes de retirarse!!!

(Translated by Google)
They're scammers, be careful when filling up. They pretend to refuel but don't. We've already filed a report. Check before you leave!
